title: androstoma empetrifolium
intro: Androstoma empetrifolium, also known as the bugle, is a flowering plant belonging to the bellflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been reported to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in natural remedies.
